# Combobox

Selects a value from a searchable list in a popover.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/combobox
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="combobox" example={0} code={`<FrameworkCombobox />`} />

```tsx
<FrameworkCombobox />
```

## Props

| Prop                | Type                      | Required | Default | Description                         |
| ------------------- | ------------------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `options`           | `ComboboxOption[]`        | Yes      | -       | -                                   |
| `value`             | `string \| undefined`     | No       | -       | Selected option value (controlled). |
| `onChange`          | `(value: string) => void` | No       | -       | -                                   |
| `placeholder`       | `string`                  | No       | -       | -                                   |
| `searchPlaceholder` | `string`                  | No       | -       | -                                   |
| `emptyText`         | `string`                  | No       | -       | -                                   |
| `disabled`          | `boolean`                 | No       | -       | -                                   |
| `size`              | `ButtonSize`              | No       | -       | -                                   |
| `className`         | `string`                  | No       | -       | -                                   |
| `'aria-label'`      | `string`                  | No       | -       | -                                   |
